entities.name: TRICOT
entities.description: On-farm triadic comparisons of technologies used for crowdsourcing participatory variety selection

entities.name: CROWDSOURCING PARTICIPATORY VARIETY SELECTION
entities.description: A method of selecting crop varieties based on crowdsourced feedback from farmers

entities.name: CITIZEN SCIENCE
entities.description: A research approach that involves the public in scientific data collection and analysis

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming and cultivation of crops

entities.name: SEEDS FOR NEEDS
entities.description: A programme developed by Bioversity International to implement the tricot methodology

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Individuals who test crop varieties on their farms and provide ranking feedback

entities.name: TRAITS
entities.description: Specific characteristics of crop varieties that are evaluated and ranked by farmers

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DATA
entities.description: Information about the environment used in conjunction with farmer feedback for analysis

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC DATA
entities.description: Information about socioeconomic factors used in conjunction with farmer feedback for analysis

entities.name: STATISTICAL METHODS FOR RANKING
entities.description: Novel statistical techniques used to analyze farmer-generated, environmental, and socioeconomic data

entities.name: SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: The infrastructure and processes involved in the production and distribution of seeds
